mapper.select:
SELECT A.IID, A.INTF_YN, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, A.LOGINID, A.YMDHMS, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, A.BARCODE, A.MES_KEY, A.INVOICENO, NVL(A.SOURCE2, 'EXCEPTION') AS SOURCE2,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER() TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_INBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'INCOMINGEXCEPTION'
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE

SELECT X.*, SUM(X.qty) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, SUM(A.QTY) AS QTY FROM T_WMS_INBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'INCOMINGEXCEPTION'
GROUP BY A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME ) X ORDER BY X.SDATE DESC

SELECT A.IID, A.INTF_YN, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, A.LOGINID, A.YMDHMS, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, A.BARCODE, A.MES_KEY, A.INVOICENO, A.TYPE, CASE WHEN A.INVOICENO = 'BARCODECOUNT' THEN 'STOCKCOUNT' ELSE A.SOURCE2 END AS SOURCE2,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER() TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_OUTBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'LOADEXCEPTION'
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE

SELECT X.*, SUM(X.qty) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, SUM(A.QTY) AS QTY FROM T_WMS_OUTBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'LOADEXCEPTION'
GROUP BY A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME ) X ORDER BY X.SDATE DESC

SELECT A.IID, A.INTF_YN, A.OUTDATE AS SDATE, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.LOGINID, REPLACE(B.SPEC, '-', '') AS OITEMCODE, A.SEQ, A.YMDHMS, CASE WHEN A.PRINTDATE IS NOT NULL AND LENGTH(A.PRINTDATE) = 14 AND REGEXP_LIKE(A.PRINTDATE, '^[0-9]{14}$') AND SUBSTR(A.PRINTDATE, 1, 4) BETWEEN '1900' AND '9999' THEN TO_CHAR( TO_DATE(A.PRINTDATE, 'YYYYMMDDHH24MISS'), 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ) ELSE A.PRINTDATE -- 날짜로 안 되면 원본 그대로 출력 END AS PRINTDATE, SUBSTR(A.OUTDATE, 9, 2) || '_' || SUBSTR(A.OUTDATE, 6, 2) || '_' || SUBSTR(A.OUTDATE, 1, 4) || '_' || REPLACE(B.SPEC, '-', '') || '_' || A.QTY || '_' || ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY A.OUTDATE ORDER BY A.YMDHMS ) AS PRODUCTBARCODE, A.BARCODE, D.WORKPLACE, A.MES_KEY, A.IFNO, D.SHIFT FROM T_WMS_WORKOUTBOUND A INNER JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE INNER JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN T_SCM_BARCODE D ON D.BARCODE = A.BARCODE WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'PRODUCTMOVE'
ORDER BY A.YMDHMS DESC

SELECT A.OUTDATE AS SDATE, A.ITEMCODE AS ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME AS ITEMNAME, SUM(A.QTY) AS QTY, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.LOGINID AS LOGINID, REPLACE(B.SPEC, '-', '') AS OITEMCODE, D.WORKPLACE, D.SHIFT FROM T_WMS_WORKOUTBOUND A INNER JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE INNER JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN T_SCM_BARCODE D ON D.BARCODE = A.BARCODE WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'PRODUCTMOVE'
GROUP BY A.OUTDATE, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.LOGINID, B.SPEC, D.WORKPLACE, D.SHIFT ORDER BY A.OUTDATE DESC, A.ITEMCODE

SELECT X.*, SUM(QTY) OVER() TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT SDATE, CUSTNAME, INVOICENO, SUM(QTY) AS QTY, COUNT(QTY) AS BOXQTY, SOURCE3, DOCK, CONTAINER, BOX1, BOX2, BOX3 FROM T_WMS_OUTBOUND WHERE USEYN = 'Y'
AND SOURCE2 = 'SALES' GROUP BY SDATE,CUSTNAME,INVOICENO,SOURCE3,DOCK,CONTAINER,BOX1,BOX2,BOX3 ) X ORDER BY X.SDATE DESC
select nvl(ifno,'') from t_wms_outbound where iid = #{iid}

SELECT a.iid, a.intf_yn, a.sdate, a.loginid, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.qty, a.barcode, a.type, nvl(a.custcode,(SELECT CUSTCODE FROM (SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_SM_SALECUSTPRICE WHERE ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE ORDER BY CONDATE DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1)) AS custcode, nvl(a.custname,(SELECT cu_sangho FROM c_cust WHERE CU_CODE = (SELECT CUSTCODE FROM (SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_SM_SALECUSTPRICE WHERE ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE ORDER BY CONDATE DESC) WHERE ROWNUM = 1))) as custname, a.ymdhms, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) as hhmm, a.source3, a.dock, a.invoiceno, a.container, b.spec,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM t_wms_outbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'LOAD'
ORDER BY SDATE DESC, YMDHMS DESC, BARCODE

SELECT x.*, SUM(x.qty) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT a.sdate, a.factory, a.storage, c.subname_ch AS car, a.itemcode, b.itemname, SUM(a.qty) AS qty, a.intf_yn, a.mes_key, NVL( a.custcode, ( SELECT custcode FROM ( SELECT custcode FROM t_sm_salecustprice WHERE itemcode = a.itemcode ORDER BY condate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) ) AS custcode, NVL( a.custname, ( SELECT cu_sangho FROM c_cust WHERE cu_code = ( SELECT custcode FROM ( SELECT custcode FROM t_sm_salecustprice WHERE itemcode = a.itemcode ORDER BY condate DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) ) ) AS custname, a.source3, a.dock, a.container, a.invoiceno, b.spec FROM t_wms_outbound a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1 AND a.useyn = 'Y' AND a.source = 'LOAD'
GROUP BY a.sdate, a.storage, c.subname_ch, a.itemcode, b.itemname, a.factory, a.intf_yn, a.custcode, a.custname, a.mes_key, a.dock, a.source3, a.container, a.invoiceno, b.spec ) x ORDER BY x.sdate DESC

SELECT A.IID, A.INTF_YN, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, NVL( A.CUSTNAME, ( SELECT CU_SANGHO FROM C_CUST WHERE CU_CODE = ( SELECT CUSTCODE FROM ( SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_SM_SALECUSTPRICE WHERE ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE ORDER BY CONDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) ) ) AS CUSTNAME, B.SPEC, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, A.LOGINID, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, A.TYPE, A.BARCODE, A.MES_KEY, SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER() TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_OUTBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'LOADRETURN'
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE

SELECT X.*, SUM(X.qty) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT A.INTF_YN, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, NVL( A.CUSTNAME, ( SELECT CU_SANGHO FROM C_CUST WHERE CU_CODE = ( SELECT CUSTCODE FROM ( SELECT CUSTCODE FROM T_SM_SALECUSTPRICE WHERE ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE ORDER BY CONDATE DESC ) WHERE ROWNUM = 1 ) ) ) AS CUSTNAME, B.SPEC, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, SUM(A.QTY) AS QTY, A.TYPE FROM T_WMS_OUTBOUND A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'LOADRETURN'
GROUP BY A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, A.INTF_YN, B.SPEC, A.CUSTNAME, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.TYPE ) X ORDER BY X.SDATE DESC

SELECT A.IID, A.INTF_YN, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE1, A.STORAGE2, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, A.LOGINID, A.YMDHMS, A.BARCODE, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, A.MES_KEY, CASE WHEN INSTR(A.BARCODE, ',') > 0 THEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(A.BARCODE, '[^,]+', 1, 2)) ELSE '' END AS BDATE,
SUM(NVL(A.QTY, 0)) OVER() AS TOTALQTY FROM T_WMS_STOCKMOVE A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y'
ORDER BY A.SDATE DESC, A.YMDHMS DESC, A.BARCODE

SELECT X.*, SUM(X.qty) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT A.INTF_YN, A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE1, A.STORAGE2, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, SUM(A.QTY) AS QTY FROM T_WMS_STOCKMOVE A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y'
GROUP BY A.SDATE, A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE1, A.STORAGE2, A.INTF_YN, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME ) X ORDER BY X.SDATE DESC

SELECT * FROM ( SELECT X.*, NVL(COUNT(*) OVER(), 0) AS totalCount, NVL(SUM(NVL(X.QTY,0)) OVER(), 0) AS totalQty, ROW_NUMBER() OVER( ORDER BY ) AS rn FROM ( SELECT a.factory AS FACTORY, a.storage AS STORAGE, a.location AS LOCATION, a.sdate AS SDATE, c.subname_ch AS CAR, a.itemcode AS ITEMCODE, b.itemname AS ITEMNAME, b.spec AS SPEC, a.qty AS QTY, a.barcode AS BARCODE, a.ymdhms AS YMDHMS, a.loginid AS LOGINID, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) AS HHMM, COALESCE(d.madate, e.madate) AS madate FROM t_wms_location a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT barcode, MAX(madate) AS madate FROM t_scm_barcode WHERE useyn = 'Y' GROUP BY barcode ) d ON d.barcode = a.barcode LEFT JOIN ( SELECT P.PBARCODE, MIN(B.MADATE) AS MADATE FROM T_SCM_PALLET P JOIN T_SCM_BARCODE B ON P.BBARCODE = B.BARCODE AND B.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE P.USEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY p.pbarcode ) e ON e.pbarcode = a.barcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
) X ) WHERE rn BETWEEN #{offset} + 1 AND #{offset} + #{itemsPerPage} ORDER BY rn

SELECT X.*, NVL(COUNT(*) OVER(), 0) AS totalCount, NVL(SUM(NVL(X.QTY, 0)) OVER(), 0) AS totalQty FROM ( SELECT a.factory AS FACTORY, a.storage AS STORAGE, a.location AS LOCATION, a.sdate AS SDATE, c.subname_ch AS CAR, a.itemcode AS ITEMCODE, b.itemname AS ITEMNAME, a.qty AS QTY, a.barcode AS BARCODE, a.ymdhms AS YMDHMS, a.loginid AS LOGINID, SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(a.ymdhms, 11, 2) AS HHMM, CASE WHEN INSTR(a.barcode, ',') > 0 THEN TRIM(REGEXP_SUBSTR(a.barcode, '[^,]+', 1, 2)) ELSE '' END AS BDATE, b.spec AS SPEC, COALESCE(d.madate, e.madate) AS madate FROM t_wms_location a LEFT JOIN t_mi_item b ON b.itemcode = a.itemcode LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub c ON c.subcode = b.carno AND c.typecode = 'MI041' LEFT JOIN ( SELECT barcode, MAX(madate) AS madate FROM t_scm_barcode WHERE useyn = 'Y' GROUP BY barcode ) d ON d.barcode = a.barcode LEFT JOIN ( SELECT P.PBARCODE, MIN(B.MADATE) AS MADATE FROM T_SCM_PALLET P JOIN T_SCM_BARCODE B ON P.BBARCODE = B.BARCODE AND B.USEYN = 'Y' WHERE P.USEYN = 'Y' GROUP BY p.pbarcode ) e ON e.pbarcode = a.barcode WHERE a.useyn = 'Y'
) X ORDER BY

when.test: excel == null or excel == '' or excel == 'N'

choose.otherwise:
SELECT Z.*, COUNT(*) OVER() AS totalCount, NVL(SUM(NVL(Z.QTY,0)) OVER(),0) AS totalQty FROM ( SELECT FACTORY , CAR , ITEMCODE , ITEMNAME , SPEC , SUM(QTY) AS QTY , MAX(IN_IF_X) AS NOQTY1 , MAX(OUT_IF_X) AS NOQTY2 , MAX(OUT_IF_WAIT) AS NOQTY3 , MAX(UNPACK_QTY) AS UNPACKQTY FROM ( SELECT a.FACTORY , a.STORAGE , a.CAR , a.ITEMCODE , a.ITEMNAME , b.SPEC AS SPEC , a.YYYYMM , SUM(a.QTY) AS QTY , SUM(a.IN_IF_X) AS IN_IF_X , SUM(a.OUT_IF_X) AS OUT_IF_X , SUM(a.OUT_IF_WAIT) AS OUT_IF_WAIT , SUM(a.UNPACK_QTY) AS UNPACK_QTY FROM V_STOCKSUM a LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM b ON b.ITEMCODE = a.ITEMCODE WHERE 1 = 1
GROUP BY a.FACTORY , a.STORAGE , a.CAR , a.ITEMCODE , a.ITEMNAME , b.SPEC , a.YYYYMM ) GROUP BY FACTORY , CAR , ITEMCODE , ITEMNAME , SPEC ) Z

mapper.select:
WITH BASE_INV AS ( /* 1. 월 1일 INVENTORY (기준재고) */ SELECT ITEMCODE, SUM(PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY) AS BASE_QTY FROM V_STOCK WHERE KIND = 'INVENTORY'
AND SDATE = #{sdate} -- 조회시작월의 1일 GROUP BY ITEMCODE ), BEFORE_MOV AS ( /* 2. 조회 시작일 이전 수불 */ SELECT ITEMCODE, SUM(PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY) AS BEFORE_QTY FROM V_STOCK WHERE KIND <> 'INVENTORY' AND SDATE >= #{sdate} --조회시작월의 1일 AND SDATE < #{searchParams.fromDate} --조회시작일
GROUP BY ITEMCODE ), PERIOD_MOV AS ( /* 3️. 조회기간 수불 (FROM ~ TO) */ SELECT ITEMCODE,
SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'INCOMING' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS INCOMING_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'INCOMING RETURN' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS INCOMING_RETURN_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'INCOMING EXCEPTION' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS INCOMING_EXCEPTION_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'LOAD' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS LOAD_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'LOAD RETURN' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS LOAD_RETURN_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'LOAD EXCEPTION' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS LOAD_EXCEPTION_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'STOCKMOVE' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS STOCKMOVE_QTY, SUM(CASE WHEN KIND = 'ADJUSTMENT' THEN PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY ELSE 0 END) AS ADJUSTMENT_QTY,
SUM(PLUSQTY - MINUSQTY) AS PERIOD_TOTAL_QTY FROM V_STOCK WHERE KIND <> 'INVENTORY'
AND SDATE BETWEEN #{searchParams.fromDate} AND #{searchParams.toDate} --조회기간 GROUP BY ITEMCODE ), BASE AS ( SELECT COALESCE(b.ITEMCODE, bf.ITEMCODE, p.ITEMCODE) AS ITEMCODE, NVL(b.BASE_QTY, 0) AS BASE_QTY, NVL(b.BASE_QTY, 0) + NVL(bf.BEFORE_QTY, 0) AS INVENTORY_QTY, NVL(p.INCOMING_QTY, 0) AS INCOMING_QTY, NVL(p.INCOMING_RETURN_QTY, 0) AS INCOMING_RETURN_QTY, NVL(p.INCOMING_EXCEPTION_QTY, 0) AS INCOMING_EXCEPTION_QTY, NVL(p.LOAD_QTY, 0) AS LOAD_QTY, NVL(p.LOAD_RETURN_QTY, 0) AS LOAD_RETURN_QTY, NVL(p.LOAD_EXCEPTION_QTY, 0) AS LOAD_EXCEPTION_QTY, NVL(p.STOCKMOVE_QTY, 0) AS STOCKMOVE_QTY, NVL(p.ADJUSTMENT_QTY, 0) AS ADJUSTMENT_QTY, NVL(b.BASE_QTY, 0) + NVL(bf.BEFORE_QTY, 0) + NVL(p.PERIOD_TOTAL_QTY, 0) AS TOTAL_QTY FROM BASE_INV b FULL OUTER JOIN BEFORE_MOV bf ON bf.ITEMCODE = b.ITEMCODE FULL OUTER JOIN PERIOD_MOV p ON p.ITEMCODE = COALESCE(b.ITEMCODE, bf.ITEMCODE) ) SELECT t.SUBNAME_CH AS ITEMTYPE, x.ITEMCODE, i.ITEMNAME, x.BASE_QTY, x.INVENTORY_QTY, x.INCOMING_QTY, x.INCOMING_RETURN_QTY, x.INCOMING_EXCEPTION_QTY, x.LOAD_QTY, x.LOAD_RETURN_QTY, x.LOAD_EXCEPTION_QTY, x.STOCKMOVE_QTY, x.ADJUSTMENT_QTY, x.TOTAL_QTY, SUM(x.TOTAL_QTY) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM BASE x LEFT JOIN t_mi_item i ON i.ITEMCODE = x.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN t_mi_typesub t ON t.subcode = i.cmb_itemtype and t.typecode = 'MI002' WHERE 1=1
ORDER BY x.ITEMCODE

SELECT A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, A.SOURCE, A.SCANTYPE, A.SDATE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, A.TYPE, A.BARCODE, A.LOCATION, A.LOTDATE, A.YMDHMS, A.LOGINID, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, B.SPEC,
SUM(A.QTY) OVER() AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT R.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY R.BARCODE ORDER BY R.SDATE DESC, R.YMDHMS DESC ) AS RN_BARCODE FROM T_WMS_REALSTOCK R WHERE R.USEYN = 'Y' AND R.SDATE = #{searchParams.sdate} ) T WHERE RN_BARCODE = 1 ) A
LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY A.YMDHMS DESC, A.ITEMCODE

SELECT X.*, SUM(X.QTY) OVER () AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT A.FACTORY, A.SDATE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, SUM(A.QTY) AS QTY, B.SPEC FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT R.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY R.BARCODE ORDER BY R.SDATE DESC, R.YMDHMS DESC ) AS RN FROM T_WMS_REALSTOCK R WHERE R.USEYN = 'Y' AND R.SDATE = #{searchParams.sdate} ) T WHERE RN = 1 ) A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y'
GROUP BY A.FACTORY, A.SDATE, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, B.SPEC ) X ORDER BY X.SDATE DESC, ITEMCODE

SELECT A.FACTORY, A.STORAGE, A.SOURCE, A.SCANTYPE, A.SDATE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, A.QTY, A.TYPE, A.BARCODE, A.LOCATION, A.LOTDATE, A.YMDHMS, A.LOGINID, SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 9, 2) || ':' || SUBSTR(A.YMDHMS, 11, 2) AS HHMM, B.SPEC,
SUM(A.QTY) OVER() AS TOTALQTY FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT R.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER( PARTITION BY R.BARCODE ORDER BY R.SDATE DESC, R.YMDHMS DESC ) AS RN_BARCODE FROM T_WMS_REALSTOCK R WHERE R.USEYN = 'Y' AND R.SDATE = #{searchParams.sdate} ) T WHERE RN_BARCODE = 1 ) A LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT OUTER JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE 1 = 1 AND A.SOURCE = 'LASTDAY'
ORDER BY A.YMDHMS DESC, A.ITEMCODE

SELECT X.*, SUM(X.QTY) OVER() AS TOTALQTY FROM( SELECT A.FACTORY, A.SDATE, C.SUBNAME_CH AS CAR, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, B.SPEC, SUM(A.QTY) AS QTY FROM ( SELECT * FROM ( SELECT R.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER ( PARTITION BY R.BARCODE ORDER BY R.SDATE DESC, R.YMDHMS DESC ) AS RN FROM T_WMS_REALSTOCK R WHERE R.USEYN = 'Y' AND R.SDATE = #{searchParams.sdate} ) T WHERE RN = 1 ) A LEFT JOIN T_MI_ITEM B ON B.ITEMCODE = A.ITEMCODE LEFT JOIN T_MI_TYPESUB C ON C.SUBCODE = B.CARNO AND C.TYPECODE = 'MI041' WHERE A.USEYN = 'Y' AND A.SOURCE = 'LASTDAY'
GROUP BY A.FACTORY, A.SDATE, C.SUBNAME_CH, A.ITEMCODE, B.ITEMNAME, B.SPEC ) X ORDER BY X.SDATE DESC, ITEMCODE

SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.location, t.itemcode, t.barcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT l.sdate, l.factory, l.storage, l.location, l.barcode, l.itemcode, l.qty, i.itemname, l.useyn, L.YMDHMS_D, (SELECT USEYN FROM T_WMS_LOCATION LL WHERE L.IID = LL.IID) AS useynnow, (SELECT memo_d FROM T_WMS_LOCATION LL WHERE L.IID = LL.IID) AS adjust, (SELECT DISTINCT 'Y' FROM T_WMS_REALSTOCK RR WHERE L.BARCODE = RR.BARCODE AND SDATE>=#{searchParams.startdate}) AS BARCODESCAN, nvl((SELECT distinct USEYN FROM T_WMS_LOCATION LL WHERE L.barcode = LL.barcode and useyn ='Y'),'N') AS useynbarcode FROM t_wms_locationBACKUP l LEFT JOIN t_wms_realstock r ON r.useyn = 'Y' AND r.barcode = l.barcode
left join t_mi_item i on i.itemcode = l.itemcode WHERE 1 = 1
AND r.location IS NULL ) t
where NOT ( -- ✅ COMPLETE 조건 전체를 부정 NVL(t.adjust, 'NORMAL') NOT IN ('ADJUSTMENT', 'LOADEXCEPTION-NOSCAN') AND ( NVL(t.useynbarcode,'Y') = 'N' OR NVL(t.barcodescan, 'N') = 'Y' ) )
where t.adjust = 'ADJUSTMENT' OR T.ADJUST = 'LOADEXCEPTION-NOSCAN'
where -- 1. ADJUST 쪽 먼저 제외 NVL(t.adjust, 'NORMAL') NOT IN ('ADJUSTMENT', 'LOADEXCEPTION-NOSCAN')
-- 2. NOSCAN 조건 충족 AND (NVL(t.useynbarcode,'Y') = 'N' OR NVL(t.barcodescan, 'N') = 'Y')
where -- 1. ADJUST 쪽 먼저 제외 NVL(t.adjust, 'NORMAL') NOT IN ('ADJUSTMENT', 'LOADEXCEPTION-NOSCAN') -- 2. NOSCAN 조건 제외 AND NOT (t.useynbarcode = 'N' OR NVL(t.barcodescan, 'N') = 'Y')
ORDER BY t.LOCATION, t.ITEMCODE, t.BARCODE

SELECT t.*, ROW_NUMBER() OVER (ORDER BY t.location, t.itemcode, t.barcode) AS rn FROM ( SELECT l.sdate, l.factory, l.storage, l.location, l.barcode, l.itemcode, l.qty, i.itemname, l.useyn, L.YMDHMS_D, (SELECT USEYN FROM T_WMS_LOCATION LL WHERE L.IID = LL.IID) AS useynnow, (SELECT memo_d FROM T_WMS_LOCATION LL WHERE L.IID = LL.IID) AS adjust, (SELECT DISTINCT 'Y' FROM T_WMS_REALSTOCK RR WHERE L.BARCODE = RR.BARCODE AND SDATE>=#{searchParams.startdate}) AS BARCODESCAN, nvl((SELECT distinct USEYN FROM T_WMS_LOCATION LL WHERE L.barcode = LL.barcode and useyn ='Y'),'N') AS useynbarcode FROM t_wms_locationBACKUP l LEFT JOIN t_wms_realstock r ON r.useyn = 'Y' AND r.barcode = l.barcode
left join t_mi_item i on i.itemcode = l.itemcode WHERE
1=1
AND r.location IS NULL ) t
where t.adjust = 'ADJUSTMENT' OR T.ADJUST = 'LOADEXCEPTION-NOSCAN'
where -- 1. ADJUST 쪽 먼저 제외 NVL(t.adjust, 'NORMAL') NOT IN ('ADJUSTMENT', 'LOADEXCEPTION-NOSCAN')
-- 2. NOSCAN 조건 충족 AND (NVL(t.useynbarcode,'Y') = 'N' OR NVL(t.barcodescan, 'N') = 'Y')
where -- 1. ADJUST 쪽 먼저 제외 NVL(t.adjust, 'NORMAL') NOT IN ('ADJUSTMENT', 'LOADEXCEPTION-NOSCAN') -- 2. NOSCAN 조건 제외 AND NOT (t.useynbarcode = 'N' OR NVL(t.barcodescan, 'N') = 'Y')
ORDER BY t.LOCATION, t.ITEMCODE, t.BARCODE
